parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Title phrase to search for

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code of the target country.

parameters.name: show_type
parameters.description: Type of shows to search in. "movie" "series" "all"

parameters.name: series_granularity
parameters.description: series_granularity. "show" for general info, or "season" or "episode".

parameters.name: output_language
parameters.description: ISO 639-1 code of the output language.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit of titles that the API brings back. Default is 3.

parameters.name: services
parameters.description: A comma separated list of up to services to search in.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code of the target country.

parameters.name: show_type
parameters.description: Type of shows to search in. "movie" "series" "all"

parameters.name: genres
parameters.description: A comma seperated list of genre ids

parameters.name: genres_relation
parameters.description: For more then one genre. "and" "or"

parameters.name: show_original_language
parameters.description: ISO 639-1 language code to only search within the shows whose original language matches with the provided language.

parameters.name: year_min
parameters.description: Minimum release/air year of the shows.

parameters.name: year_max
parameters.description: Maximum release/air year of the shows.

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: A keyword to only search within the shows have that keyword in their overview or title.

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: Determines the ordering of the results. Enum "original_title" "year" "popularity_alltime" "popularity_1year" "popularity_1month" "popularity_1week"

parameters.name: series_granularity
parameters.description: series_granularity. "show" for general info, or "season" or "episode".

parameters.name: output_language
parameters.description: ISO 639-1 code of the output language.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit of titles that the API brings back. Default is 3.

get.summary: Get by Id. Get the details of a show via IMDb or TMDb id, including the global streaming availability info.

parameters.name: imdb_id
parameters.description: A comma separated list of up to services to search in. Example imdb_id=tt0120338

parameters.name: tmdb_id
parameters.description: TMDb ID of the target show. Example tmdb_id=movie/59

parameters.name: series_granularity
parameters.description: Type of shows to search in. "movie" "series" "all"

parameters.name: output_language
parameters.description: ISO 639-1 code of the output language.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit of titles that the API brings back. Default is 3.

get.summary: Leaving. Query for the leaving movies/series/seasons/episodes in a given list of streaming services.

parameters.name: services
parameters.description: A comma separated list of up to services to search in.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code of the target country.

parameters.name: target_type
parameters.description: Enum "show" "movie" "series" "season" "episode"

parameters.name: output_language
parameters.description: ISO 639-1 code of the output language.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit of titles that the API brings back. Default is 3.
